unregisterOnShutdown.title: Unregister On Shutdown
unregisterOnShutdown.description: Unregister all devices on shutdown (development only)

devices.title: Devices
devices.description: List of AUX AC devices to control

name.title: Device Name
name.description: Display name for this AC unit

connection.title: Connection Type
connection.description: How to connect to the AC unit

cloudEmail.title: Cloud: Email
cloudEmail.description: AUX / BroadLink cloud account email (only for cloud connection)

cloudPassword.title: Cloud: Password
cloudPassword.description: AUX / BroadLink cloud account password (only for cloud connection)

cloudRegion.title: Cloud: Region
cloudRegion.description: Cloud server region (only for cloud connection)

cloudDeviceId.title: Cloud: Device ID
cloudDeviceId.description: Specific device endpoint ID, leave empty to auto-detect first device (only for cloud connection)

localIp.title: Local: IP Address
localIp.description: Local IP address of the Broadlink module (only for local connection)

localMac.title: Local: MAC Address
localMac.description: MAC address of the Broadlink module, format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF (only for local connection)

showFan.title: Show Fan Control
showFan.description: Expose a separate fan device for speed control

showComfWind.title: Show Comfortable Wind
showComfWind.description: Expose a switch for comfortable wind mode

showDisplay.title: Show Display Switch
showDisplay.description: Expose a switch to control the LED display

tempStep.title: Temperature Step
tempStep.description: Temperature adjustment step size in degrees
